meta.title: NOVA DIGITAL TECH — Web, App Development & Automation
meta.description: We build premium websites, mobile apps, booking systems, branding, and AI automation tools for small businesses, startups, and entrepreneurs.

hero.headline: We Build Digital Solutions That Help Your Business
hero.subheadline: Websites, mobile apps, booking systems, branding, and automation built to make your business look professional, attract customers, and save time.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Services Built for
services.subtitle: From websites to AI automation, we deliver everything your business needs to stand out online and attract more customers.

web.title: Website Development
web.description: Modern, responsive, SEO-ready websites for businesses that need to look professional online.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: iOS and Android app solutions for businesses, startups, and service platforms.

booking.title: Booking Systems
booking.description: Appointment scheduling, service booking, customer request forms, and business workflow tools.

branding.title: Branding & Design
branding.description: Logos, brand identity, social media graphics, digital flyers, and business visuals.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.description: Smart tools that automate tasks, improve customer support, organize leads, and save time.

setup.title: Business Digital Setup
setup.description: Help businesses set up online presence, contact forms, landing pages, social media links, and customer funnels.

growth.title: Designed for Growth
growth.description: Every project we build is strategically designed to help your business attract more customers and increase revenue.

premium.title: Premium & Trustworthy
premium.description: We make your brand look premium and trustworthy so customers choose you over the competition.

mobile.title: Mobile-First Experiences
mobile.description: Every website and app we build looks and works flawlessly on phones, tablets, and desktops.

workflow.title: Simplified Workflows
workflow.description: We simplify booking, contact, and customer flow so you spend less time on admin and more on your business.

ai.title: Modern Tools & AI
ai.description: We use cutting-edge tools and AI to build faster, smarter solutions that keep you ahead of the curve.

support.title: End-to-End Support
support.description: We offer support before, during, and after launch — your success is our priority.

portfolio.label: Our Work
portfolio.title: Digital Experiences Built to
portfolio.subtitle: Real concepts designed to showcase how we help businesses transform their digital presence.

restaurant.title: Restaurant Website + Online Ordering Concept
restaurant.description: A modern restaurant website with online ordering, menu showcase, and reservation system that helped increase online orders by 3x.

barber.title: Barber Booking App Concept
barber.description: A sleek mobile booking app for a barbershop chain, featuring real-time availability, stylist selection, and push notification reminders.

cleaning.title: Cleaning Service Website + Booking System
cleaning.description: A professional website with integrated booking system, service area mapping, and automated customer follow-ups for a cleaning company.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We learn about your business, goals, services, and customers to build the perfect strategy.

design.title: Design
design.description: We create a clean, modern layout that matches your brand and speaks to your audience.

build.title: Build
build.description: We develop the website, app, booking system, or automation with modern, scalable technology.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We help you go live and make sure everything works smoothly across all devices.

support.title: Support
support.description: We stay available for updates, changes, and improvements — your growth never stops.

packages.label: Packages
packages.title: Solutions for Every
packages.subtitle: Flexible packages designed to match your needs and budget. Every project is custom — no cookie-cutter templates.
packages.customNote: All packages are customizable. Contact us for a tailored quote.

1.quote: NOVA completely transformed our online presence. We went from zero web presence to getting inquiries every single day. The booking system they built saved us hours of phone calls.
1.name: Sandra Mitchell

2.quote: They built us a booking app that our clients actually love using. Missed appointments dropped by half and our reviews went up. The team was professional from start to finish.
2.name: Marcus Johnson

3.quote: We needed a modern website that could handle online orders and reservations. NOVA delivered beyond what we expected — the design is stunning and it works perfectly on mobile.
3.name: Elena Rodriguez

showcase.label: Live Product Demos
showcase.title: Real Solutions We
showcase.subtitle: See the kind of digital products and systems we design, develop, and deploy for real businesses every day.

dashboard.title: Business Intelligence Dashboards
dashboard.description: We build custom dashboards that give business owners real-time visibility into their revenue, bookings, customer activity, and growth metrics — all in one clean interface.

barber.title: Smart Booking Applications
barber.description: Mobile-first booking apps with real-time availability, stylist selection, and automated reminders.

restaurant.title: Online Ordering Systems
restaurant.description: Complete ordering platforms with menu management, cart, and payment processing built in.

1.before: Outdated website that looks unprofessional, slow, and doesn't work on mobile devices
1.after: Modern, fast, mobile-friendly website that builds trust and converts visitors into customers

2.before: Manually managing bookings through phone calls, texts, and paper — missing appointments constantly
2.after: Automated booking system with real-time availability, reminders, and zero missed appointments

3.before: Weak branding with no visual identity — business looks generic and forgettable to customers
3.after: Premium brand identity with professional logo, colors, and visuals that stand out from the competition
